title: More Ore -
description: Mod that adds more content and more ore to minecraft. New content includes bosses, dimensions, weapons.
body: The mod adds ores such as: Tungsten, Adamantite, Abomination, Godly ore and many others. You are also able to craft many insane weapons and armor. there are lots of bosses and dimensions also including sky islands and other structures you can find around the world like A BIG TREE
